character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Treats the sick among a group of mutineers and pirates.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A leader among mutineers, described as having a crutch and commanding presence.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A boy among the group, described as a patient.

character_dossiers.name: George Merry
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group, reacts negatively to medicine.

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: A member of the group, described as part of the mutineers.

character_dossiers.name: Dick
character_dossiers.biography: A patient with fever, described as part of the group.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: A member of the group, gives a pledge to the doctor.

character_dossiers.name: Cap'n Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in the doctor's dialogue as a figure of authority.
